author: player_a
events_i_witnessed: I forced Tomas away from the maintenance room after the canister ruptured, ignoring Corwin's obsession with it.
The pressure hatch to the corridor jammed, forcing us to abandon it and move deeper into the lower facility.
Tomas led us into a blind conduit full of runoff while suffering from severe frostbite and confusion.
I witnessed the primordial vapor begin to web the walls with frost, following us from the maintenance room.
beliefs: Tomas is dying and needs immediate medical attention, likely at the filtration tanks or the sluices.
Corwin has been completely lost to the facility's corruption and is no longer a human person I can bargain with.
The vapor is a lethal, mind-altering toxin that must be avoided at all costs to ensure our survival.
The facility's layout is shifting or designed to trap us, and we are running out of time.
open_threads: Find a path to the filtration tanks and the drainage sluices to escape Stillwell Hydro.
Stabilize Tomas's condition and prevent the frostbite from spreading further.
Avoid the encroaching primordial vapor and whatever has become of Corwin.
